channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Guam and Pacific islands brace for Super Typhoon Bavi impact
item.description: Residents of the Northern Mariana Islands, remote U.S. territories in the Pacific, are preparing for Super Typhoon Bavi, which experts warn could be severe.

item.title: FIFA suspends Folarin Balogun's ban, allowing U.S. striker to play Belgium
item.description: FIFA has temporarily lifted U.S. soccer player Folarin Balogun's World Cup ban, enabling him to participate in the round of 16 match against Belgium.

item.title: Construction is often seen as a male domain. These women are breaking down barriers.
item.description: Women account for only 3% of construction workers in Kenya. A nonprofit is helping them enter the field and advance.

item.title: California's new law aims to standardize 'sell by' dates to cut food waste.
item.description: NPR's Ayesha Rascoe speaks with Nick Lapis of Californians Against Waste about the new law standardizing food label dates.
